metadata.title: Japan to deploy faster EV chargers on highways - Nikkei Asia
metadata.description: TOKYO -- Japan plans to more than double the output of electric vehicle chargers used at highway service areas, helping to shorten recharging times an

source_meta.snippet: Aug 7, 2023 — Existing fast chargers have an average output of around 40 kW, the ministry reports. Boosting the output can shorten charging time...
